headline: A Look At Nova (NVMI) Valuation After Record Q1 2026 Beat And Upgraded Outlook
summary: Nova (NasdaqGS:NVMI) is back in focus after reporting record first quarter 2026 revenue and profitability, beating its own guidance and analyst estimates, and pairing those results with stronger guidance for the second quarter. See our latest analysis for Nova. Nvidia’s weaker session on May 13 pulled the wider semiconductor group lower, and Nova’s stock also fell on that day as investors reduced risk before the Q1 report. Even so, the 90-day share price return of 14.74% and 1-year total...

headline: Why DBA’s Five Year Lead Over WEAT Vanished in Just Five Days
summary: The choice between Invesco DB Agriculture Fund (NYSEARCA:DBA) and Teucrium Wheat Fund (NYSEARCA:WEAT) comes down to whether you want the entire farm or a single field. DBA spreads across corn, soybeans, wheat, sugar, coffee, cocoa, cattle, and hogs. WEAT holds nothing but CBOT wheat futures, laddered across contract months. So far in 2026, that distinction ... headline: Nvidia’s China H200 Approval Raises New Questions For Valuation And Risk
summary: U.S. regulators approved Nvidia (NasdaqGS:NVDA) to sell H200 AI chips to around 10 major Chinese technology companies after roughly a year of export restrictions. CEO Jensen Huang traveled with President Trump on Air Force One to Beijing as one of only two CEOs in the official China delegation. Actual H200 shipments to China are still paused because of Beijing’s own rules, leaving the timing and scale of any China related data center revenue uncertain. Nvidia, traded as NasdaqGS:NVDA, sits...
